title: Explain CompletableFuture in Java. How does it improve asynchronous programming?

answers.junior: CompletableFuture lets you run tasks asynchronously and handle results when ready.
answers.middle: CompletableFuture supports async tasks, chaining, and callbacks. It simplifies async code and error handling.
answers.senior: CompletableFuture enables non-blocking, composable async workflows. Use thenApply, thenAccept, exceptionally, and combine multiple futures. Prefer for modern async programming.
answers.tricky: CompletableFuture supports complex async pipelines, error handling, and composition. Analyze thread pool usage, exception propagation, and performance. Prefer for scalable, reactive systems.
